title: Reflections on Things at Hand
description: Zhu Xi's anthology of Neo-Confucian philosophy: the investigation of things leads to the extension of knowledge.
introduction: Zhu Xi's anthology of Neo-Confucian philosophy: the investigation of things leads to the extension of knowledge.

translation.text: The mind of Heaven and Earth is to give life to things. The student should observe this and take it as the starting point.
